message:
refactor(cli): improve binding detection, cleanup send.go, enhance watch

Various CLI command improvements for robustness and maintainability.

bind.go improvements:
- Add isBindingLine() helper that properly parses tmux binding syntax
- Handles both "bind-key -n KEY" and "bind -n KEY" forms
- Fixes false positives when searching for bindings containing the key
  as a substring (e.g., searching for "F6" matching "F16")
- Refactor setupBinding() and removeBinding() to use the new helper
- Fix removeBinding() to properly detect missing bindings

send.go cleanup:
- Remove unused constants: fileChangeScanDelay, conflictWarningDelay,
  conflictLookback, conflictWarnMax
- Remove unused tracker import
- Code was dead after conflict detection was moved elsewhere

watch.go improvements:
- Enhanced file watching with better error handling
- Improved debouncing for rapid file change events

pane_name.go + pane_name_test.go:
- Minor updates to pane naming logic
- Additional test coverage for edge cases

scan.go:
- Minor fix for scan command behavior

upgrade.go:
- Minor update to upgrade command

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
